steps.title: Treat x minus 5 as a block
steps.content: Both terms contain the same block, $x-5$: $$2(x-5)+3(x-5)=10$$ Combine them: $$5(x-5)=10$$

steps.title: Solve for the requested value
steps.content: The question asks for $x-5$, not $x$. Divide by $5$: $$x-5=2$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: $2$ is correct. $7$ would be the value of $x$, but the question asks for $x-5$.
